testcase.name: test_wealth_overview

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'total_wealth' in {'asset_allocation': {'cash': {'percent': 4.4, 'target': 5.0, 'value': 125000}, 'crypto': {'percent': 1.2, 'target': 2.0, 'value': 35000}, 'etfs': {'percent': 9.8, 'target': 10.0, 'value': 280000}, 'managed_funds': {'percent': 11.2, 'target': 10.0, 'value': 320000}, ...}, 'cash': {'accounts': [{'balance': 15000, 'interest_rate': 0.01, 'name': 'CBA Smart Access', 'type': 'transaction'}, {'balance': 50000, 'interest_rate': 4.75, 'name': 'CBA Goal Saver', 'type': 'savings'}, {'balance': 40000, 'interest_rate': 5.1, 'maturity': '2025-06-15', 'name': 'Westpac Term Deposit', ...}, {'balance': 20000, 'interest_rate': 5.5, 'name': 'ING Savings Maximiser', 'type': 'savings'}], 'total': 125000, 'total_interest_earned_ytd': 3250}, 'client_id': 'client_1', 'crypto': {'exchange': 'Swyftx', 'holdings': [{'cost_base': 18000, 'current_price': 68500, 'name': 'Bitcoin', 'symbol': 'BTC', ...}, {'cost_base': 8500, 'current_price': 3850, 'name': 'Ethereum', 'symbol': 'ETH', ...}, {'cost_base': 1500, 'current_price': 175, 'name': 'Solana', 'symbol': 'SOL', ...}], 'last_sync': '2026-03-17T00:33:57.259525+00:00', 'total_cost_base': 28000, ...}, ...}

testcase.name: test_compliance_dashboard

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'overall_score' in {'metrics': {'audit_logs_this_month': 0, 'average_compliance_score': 94.5, 'reviews_completed_mtd': 8, 'soas_generated_mtd': 12}, 'overview': {'action_required': 3, 'compliance_rate': 93.3, 'compliant': 42, 'total_clients': 45}, 'recent_activity': [{'action': 'SOA Generated', 'client': 'Emma Wilson', 'timestamp': '2026-03-16T22:33:57.391169'}, {'action': 'Compliance Check', 'client': 'David Lee', 'timestamp': '2026-03-16T19:33:57.391174'}, {'action': 'Document Signed', 'client': 'Lisa Chen', 'timestamp': '2026-03-16T00:33:57.391176'}], 'risk_alerts': [{'message': '3 clients due for annual review this week', 'severity': 'high'}, {'message': '2 SOAs pending client signature', 'severity': 'medium'}, {'message': '5 risk profiles due for reassessment next month', 'severity': 'low'}], ...}
